particulars.description: All freehold and leasehold properties (whether registered or unregistered) and all commonhold properties, now or in the future (and from time to time) owned by the chargor, or in which the chargor holds an interest.

The freehold property known as goswell house, shirley avenue, windsor SL4 5LH registered at hm land registry with title number BK338152. (Medina house).. The freehold property known as land on the east side of vale road, windsor registered at hm land registry with title number BK15806 (unit 2).. the freehold property known as 3 shirley avenue, windsor SL4 5LH registered at hm land registry with title number BK16057. (Unit 3).. the freehold property being land on the east side of goswell house, shirley avenue, windsor registered at hm land registry with title number BK488121.
